articles.author: Karishma Ayaldasani
articles.title: ‘Rejected job offers in US’: CJP's Abhijeet Dipke on India return, reason for protest | India News - Hindustan Times
articles.description: Dipke said his decision to return was motivated by a desire to contribute to India and advocate for issues affecting students and young people. | India News
articles.content: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) founder Abhijeet Dipke on Monday said that he had received multiple employment offers in the US in recent weeks but had decided against accepting them because he loves… [+4870 chars]
